code:
var tree := Engine.get_main_loop() as SceneTree
var edited := tree.edited_scene_root
if edited == null:
	executeContext.output("error", "edited null")
	return
var xiaokong := edited.get_node_or_null("xiaokong")
if xiaokong == null:
	executeContext.output("error", "no xiaokong")
	return

var head := xiaokong.get_node_or_null("%GeneralSkeleton/头") as MeshInstance3D
var brow := xiaokong.get_node_or_null("%GeneralSkeleton/眉毛_AppliedMods") as MeshInstance3D
if head != null and head.mesh != null:
	executeContext.output("head_path", String(head.get_path()))
	executeContext.output("head_mesh_resource_path", String(head.mesh.resource_path))
	executeContext.output("head_mesh_class", head.mesh.get_class())
	executeContext.output("head_blend_shape_count", str(head.mesh.get_blend_shape_count()))
if brow != null and brow.mesh != null:
	executeContext.output("brow_path", String(brow.get_path()))
	executeContext.output("brow_mesh_resource_path", String(brow.mesh.resource_path))
	executeContext.output("brow_mesh_class", brow.mesh.get_class())
	executeContext.output("brow_blend_shape_count", str(brow.mesh.get_blend_shape_count()))

var stack := [xiaokong]
var total_meshes: int = 0
var meshes_with_blend: int = 0
while not stack.is_empty():
	var n := stack.pop_back() as Node
	if n == null:
		continue
	for child_variant in n.get_children():
		var child := child_variant as Node
		if child != null:
			stack.push_back(child)
	if n is MeshInstance3D:
		total_meshes += 1
		var mi := n as MeshInstance3D
		if mi.mesh != null and mi.mesh.get_blend_shape_count() > 0:
			meshes_with_blend += 1
			executeContext.output("mesh_with_blend", String(mi.name) + ":" + str(mi.mesh.get_blend_shape_count()))

executeContext.output("total_meshes", str(total_meshes))
executeContext.output("meshes_with_blend", str(meshes_with_blend))
